verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Cause me to come to Thy river, Oh Lord; (3x) Cause me to come, cause me to drink, cause me to live.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cause me to drink at Thy river, Oh Lord; (3x) Cause me to come, cause me to drink, cause me to live.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Cause me to live in Thy presence, Oh Lord; (3x) Cause me to come, cause me to drink, cause me to live.
